content.en:
"The feeling of the child of the era, so powerful!"

Ye Tian felt that his current self was far beyond before, and he could easily kill his previous self, the god level of the child of the universe, and even the supreme level son of the universe, was like an ant in his eyes.

This is the Son of the Ages!

"To become the son of the era, my accumulation is enough, there is no need to continue to accumulate at the god level, it's time to impact the true god level realm!"

Impacting the True God Realm, Ye Tian needs to endure six thunder tribulations, and the Supreme Hall of the Human Race is a supreme treasure that will block the arrival of thunder tribulations.

Therefore, Ye Tian needed to leave the Supreme Hall of the Human Race.

Origins.

Ye Tian came to a remote void and began to impact the True God Realm.

In just an instant, Ye Tian broke through the bottleneck of the true god level, and the immortal power began to transform into a true god-level immortal power.

The god-level breakthrough to the true god-level is the transformation of immortal power or divine power, and the physical body of ordinary people cannot be improved, although Ye Tian can cultivate the eighteen golden body techniques, but the physical body will not be automatically improved.

At this moment, Ye Tian's immortal power transformation was completed, and he became a true god-level immortal power, and he officially stepped into the true god-level realm.

The true god-level immortal power is much more powerful than the god-level immortal power, as soon as Ye Tian stepped into the true god-level, his strength skyrocketed many times, and the momentum was enough to crush the god-level, making it difficult for the god-level to move.

Thundered!!!

A cloud of calamity appeared above the void.

"The Thunder Tribulation is coming!"

Ye Tian muttered.

This time, the Cloud Tribulation is six Thunder Tribulations, and the power of each Thunder Tribulation is extremely terrifying, even if it is the first Thunder Tribulation, it is enough to kill ordinary god-level powerhouses.

If His Invincible Eternal Ancient Highness had just broken through to the True God level and faced such a thunderous tribulation, he would definitely die.

However, Ye Tian is now the son of the era, and he is not afraid of such a thunderstorm.

Soon, the first thunderstorm came!

Rumble!!!

The thunder pillar bombarded down, and Ye Tian unleashed the Chaos Palm with one hand, smashing out the first thunder tribulation, showing an invincible posture.

The second thunderstorm!

The third thunder tribulation!

The Fourth Thunder Tribulation!

Fifth Thunder Tribulation!

......

The thunder tribulations couldn't help Ye Tian, and they were easily swept away by Ye Tian, only the sixth thunder tribulation made Ye Tian's palms numb, but it still didn't hurt Ye Tian.

"If I am still a top-level supreme-level highness, although I can survive the six thunder tribulations, I will definitely be injured, and the injury will not be light. But these six thunder tribulations are a piece of cake for the Son of Era!"

Ye Tian thought to himself.

After the thunder tribulation, Ye Tian no longer had any worries, and truly became a true god-level powerhouse.

Returning to the Supreme Hall of the Terran Race, Ye Tian began to retreat.

He first had to raise his cultivation from the first order of the True God level to the ninth order of the True God level, and the accumulation of cultivation was very simple for him, his cultivation talent was the highest level, plus he had the talent of god-level time, it was easy to cultivate to the ninth order of the true god level.

Due to his infinite lifespan, Ye Tian has been using god-level time talent to speed up time in his current cultivation, and within a few months, Ye Tian has successfully improved his cultivation to the ninth order of the true god level.

Next, Ye Tian began to cultivate the fifth set of movements and the sixth set of movements of the Eighteen Golden Body Technique.

At present, if he wants to improve the strength of his physical body, he can only rely on the eighteen golden body techniques, otherwise there is no way to increase the strength of his physical body.

So, Ye Tian went to the Six Paths Reincarnation Tower, passed on the fifth set of movements, and then cultivated.

With the help of Heavenly Dao Gold Liquid, Ye Tian's cultivation of the fifth set of movements progressed very quickly, and he completely completed the cultivation of the fifth set of movements in a month.

Then, Ye Tian went to inherit the sixth set of movements, and it only took a month and a half to completely complete the cultivation of the sixth set of movements.

At this point, Ye Tian had completed the cultivation of the Eighteen Golden Body Techniques of the True God Stage, and the strength of his physical body had increased many times.

However, even so, Ye Tian's current combat power still fell to the Supreme Highness, and he needed to improve more in other aspects before he could return to the ranks of the sons of the era.

For example, the compression of immortal power, the mastery of the sword, the secret art of the gods, the attainment of supernatural powers, etc., these are all things that need to be improved, otherwise the combat power will fall.

Only by making progress forever can we maintain the combat power of the same level, or even surpass the combat power of the same level.

At present, the easiest thing is to compress the immortal power, which is progressing all the time, and you only need to work hard to cultivate, and you can continue to compress the immortal power.

And the more difficult thing is to improve the sword path mastery and supernatural attainments!

Ye Tian's Sword Dao Peerless Realm has been upgraded to the strongest peak-level Sword Dao Peer, and further up is the Strongest Rank Sword Dao Peerless, but it is too difficult to create a Strongest Rank Sword Dao Peerless.

this day.

Ye Tian came to the ancient stone gate of the Xuan-level area and the earth-level area of the Supreme Hall of the Human Race, also known as the Earth Gate.

You can enter the prefecture-level area by breaking through the underground gate, and Ye Tian easily broke through the underground gate, came to the prefecture-level area, and became a highness in the prefecture-level region.

Prefecture-level area, ancient sea.

This is the largest cultivation treasure land in the prefecture-level region, and there are ancient pagodas on the ancient sea, and these pagodas are the best cultivation places in the prefecture-level region.

After Ye Tian entered the Ancient Sea, he occupied the best pagoda in the center of the Ancient Sea as his cultivation tower.

And soon, the news of Ye Tian's arrival in the earth-level region spread, and the highnesses of the prefecture-level region came to visit Ye Tian one by one.

Ye Tian entertained them, and he had a preliminary understanding of the highnesses of these prefecture-level regions.

There are not many highnesses in the prefecture-level region, only ninety-eight, because the supreme hall of the human race pays attention to quality, not quantity, so many highnesses in the Xuan-level region cannot come to the prefecture-level region at all.

Among the highnesses in the prefecture-level region, the weakest ones have the first-grade ordinary level Son of the Universe combat power, and the strongest ones have the second-grade Eternal Ancient Highnesses.

It's just that after Ye Tian came to the earth-level area, the strongest earth-level highness was Ye Tian.

After entering the prefecture-level area, Ye Tian cultivated steadily for a period of time, compressing his immortal power every day, comprehending the secret techniques of the divine codex, perfecting his secret techniques of the divine codex, and occasionally cultivating the sword path mastery.

And so, thirty years passed.

this day.

Ye Tian was in the process of cultivating, and the Kunwu Supreme sent a message asking him to go to the Kunwu Palace.

So, Ye Tian ended his practice and went to Kunwu Palace.

Kunwu Temple.

Kunwu Supreme, Qinghuang Supreme, and Absolute Curse Supreme, these three supremes are all here.

"I've seen the Kunwu Supreme, the Blue Emperor Supreme, and the Absolute Curse Supreme!"

Ye Tian bent down and saluted.

Kunwu Supreme said: "Ye Tian, this time I called you here because it has something to do with the Six Paths Reincarnation Tower, under the countless treasures of our human race and the huge price paid, we have finally completely revived the origin of the Six Paths Reincarnation Tower, and it has been restored like this. Now, the Six Realms of Reincarnation Pagoda is fully equipped with the power of the Supreme Treasure. Now, the Six Realms of Reincarnation Tower can fully open the Six Realms of Reincarnation, and can allow living beings to reincarnate once and cultivate again. "

"The Six Realms of Reincarnation Pagoda has been revived!"

Ye Tian was also pleasantly surprised.

Once the supreme treasure of the Six Realms Reincarnation Tower is revived, it will be too much of a help to the human race.

At this time, Kunwu Supreme said again: "Ye Tian, I suggest that you use the six reincarnation of the Six Paths of the Reincarnation Tower to practice. In addition, I will give you ten places for reincarnation, and if you don't need them yourself, you can use these ten places to fight for some benefits for yourself. "

"Kungo Supreme, thank you!"

Ye Tiandao.
